mnemonics: NAMED: Navigate, Access, Modularize, Encapsulate, Directory
keyPoints: Packages group related classes and interfaces for better organization
The 'import' keyword is used to access classes from other packages
Package naming convention uses a reversed domain name to ensure uniqueness (e.g., com.example.mypackage)
commonMistakes: Forgetting to include the package statement at the top of the file before any import statements
Not using the correct directory structure that matches the package hierarchy
Attempting to access default (package-private) classes from another package
